id.description: Unique identifier for the glossary word using UUID v4 format

en_word.description: The word in English, typically in uppercase. This is the basis for identifying the word in the glossary

related_words.description: List of related words in the glossary, using their en_word names

tags.description: List of tags associated with the word, chosen from the predefined PlanB tags list

original_language.description: ISO 639-1 language code indicating the original language of the word definition

license.description: License under which the content is distributed

proofreading.description: Proofreading metadata for each language translation

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for this proofreading entry

last_contribution_date.description: Date of the last contribution in YYYY-MM-DD format, or null if not yet contributed

urgency.description: Level of urgency for proofreading, 1 being low urgency

contributor_names.description: List of contributor GitHub usernames who have proofread this language

reward.description: Amount of sats available as reward for proofreading
